masked nursedroid

While a JoyCo nursedroid by make, she’s now a dark and dirty mockery of one. Tattered and filthy, her once pristine, standard-issue nursedroid attire looks incredibly worse for wear. The coverings around her chest are particularly worn out, in no small part due to her bosom being swollen to a size similar to Narc’s full capacity. Her long, dark pink synthetic hair is pulled back into two thick pigtails in perhaps the only remnant of her former standard presentation. Black-and-white eyes stare at you with unblinking focus only made possible by her synthetic being. The lower half of her face is covered by a sterile white surgical mask, obscuring many of her fine features from view. A black bag is slung over one shoulder, surely containing more knives like the one clutched in her dainty hand.

The droid pulls a pamphlet out from her impressive cleavage and hands it to you. It’s formatted like a restaurant menu, with goods and prices listed. You notice a curious mix of both over and under the counter drugs. \n\nThe nurse stares at you expectantly, seemingly waiting for you to tell her what it is you want.
scarred nursedroid

The JoyCo nursedroid is a pitiful sight. Torn and tattered, her sewn-on uniform is in ruins, even worse than Narc’s was when you first met her. Words like ‘whore’ and ‘slut’ are haphazardly spray-painted all over her with bright neon colors that glow ominously. Quite a bit of the paint is mixed into her loose-hanging hair, the original pink mostly obscured by greens, yellows, and reds. A wicked scar runs up the length of her pale face, the cruel, jagged line running diagonally through all of her once beautiful features. A bit of damage is visible on the surface of her left eye, although both monochrome orbs stare at you with fully functional intent. A black bag is slung over one shoulder, surely containing more knives like the one clutched in her dainty hand.
burned nursedroid

The nursedroid appears fully functional, despite clearly having taken significant damage. Extensive burns have blackened large portions of her pale synth skin, and burned away a good deal of her sewn-on uniform. Despite the seeming severity of burns, her body doesn’t appear shriveled up or dried out, being as full and plump as she should be. Her chest, despite showing signs of damage, is a prime example, currently filled to a size larger than Narc’s default B-cup. Her synthetic hair appears frazzled and thick, or at least what’s left of it - a fair portion clearly burnt off. One part of her you notice has zero obvious signs of damage are her black-and-white eyes, which stare at you unwaveringly. A black bag is slung over one shoulder, surely containing more knives like the one clutched in her dainty hand.
Nerrasa just keeps up with her reps whilst you browse the store’s wares, paying you no mind what so ever.

You tell Nevrie you’d like to see what the Xenogen store has in stock. “Sure thing,” she answers, spinning one of the holodisplays around so you can read it. “Punch in whatever you want from the inventory list here, and one of the cargo bots will fetch it from storage.” While you peruse the shop’s holographic wares, Nevrie leans back in her swivel chair and pulls the bag of snacks she was eating earlier back out of the drawer and resumes munching, only occasionally shooting a glance your way.

Uuuh... here.” A blush creeps into her cheeks and she fiddles with her datapad before holding it out to you.

On the monitors, the glow of a holo pad near to her bed catches your eye; zooming in reveals it to be ‘Johann’s Big and Burly Bear-annual III’. A couple of Ramis’s fingers gleam with moisture.
A medley of trance and hip-hop blares at full blast from Ramis’s room.
Slightly more bearable than the Kait-Pop she so adores, but does she have to have it on so loud? Perhaps you should go check on her.
It’s her going-out mix. Clearly she’s excited to have landed back on Tavros again!
